scripts.test: vitest run && pnpm --filter @submittedit/receipt-core test && pnpm --filter @submittedit/contract-client test && pnpm --filter @submittedit/web test && pnpm --filter @submittedit/extension test
scripts.test:browser-parity: pnpm --filter @submittedit/receipt-core build && pnpm --filter @submittedit/receipt-core test:exports && playwright test --config playwright.receipt-core.config.ts
scripts.check: pnpm contract:deployment:check && pnpm format:check && pnpm icons:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @submittedit/web audit:relay-client && pnpm --filter @submittedit/extension audit:build && pnpm --filter @submittedit/contract-client test:exports && pnpm test:browser-parity && pnpm secrets:check
